About.title: About Us
About.description1: Kaloudis is a well-known florist offering a wide variety of flowers and plants suitable for every occasion. We emphasize high aesthetic quality and excellent customer service.
About.description2: We provide floral decoration services for weddings, baptisms and receptions, creating original compositions. We also offer a rich collection of indoor and outdoor plants, as well as complete landscaping services.
About.qualityDesc: Service with a smile, honesty and dedication to every customer
About.varietyDesc: From fresh cut flowers to rare plants and carnivorous species

WeddingBanner.title: Your Dream Wedding Starts Here
WeddingBanner.description: We create stunning floral arrangements for your church ceremony and reception. From the bridal bouquet to the last centerpiece — every detail designed with love.

Products.pestProductsDesc: Mouse poison, insecticides and solutions for cockroaches, ants and snake repellent

ServicePages.contentCTA: Explore all of our <services>landscaping and floral services</services> or browse the <flowers>fresh flowers and plants</flowers> available at our shop in Ilioupoli, Athens.

weddings.title: Wedding Decorations
weddings.heroDescription: We create unique wedding floral arrangements that transform any venue into a fairytale setting. From the church to the reception, every detail is designed with love.
weddings.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we specialize in wedding decoration with fresh flowers and original compositions that reflect each couple's personal style. We handle complete church floral decoration — from the wedding candles and crowns to the entrance and altar arrangements. We serve weddings at churches and reception venues throughout Attica.
weddings.content2: The bridal bouquet is one of the most important elements of your special day. We create bouquets in every style — romantic, modern, boho, or classic — using the finest seasonal flowers. Each composition is handcrafted with attention to detail and color harmony.
weddings.content3: Reception decoration includes table centerpieces, wish table arrangements, candy bar decoration, and decorative accents throughout the venue. We design every detail to create a cohesive aesthetic that will impress your guests. We collaborate with the finest reception venues across Attica.
weddings.content4: Our extensive experience in wedding floral decoration allows us to adapt to any budget without compromising on quality. We offer free consultations at our shop, where you can view samples, choose your color palette, and design your dream wedding decoration together.
weddings.feature1Desc: Complete church floral arrangement with candles, crowns, altar compositions, and entrance decoration
weddings.feature2Desc: Handcrafted bridal bouquets in every style, from classic to contemporary
weddings.feature3Desc: Table centerpieces, wish table, candy bar, and decorative elements throughout the venue
weddings.feature4Desc: Free consultation and personalized proposals tailored to every taste and budget
weddings.faq1Question: How far in advance should I book my wedding decoration?
weddings.faq1Answer: We recommend booking at least 3-4 months before your wedding, especially during the summer season. This gives us enough time to design the perfect arrangement and secure the flowers you desire.
weddings.faq2Question: Do you decorate churches and venues in other areas?
weddings.faq2Answer: Absolutely! We serve weddings throughout Attica. Delivery and setup are handled by our team.
weddings.faq3Question: What does a complete wedding decoration package include?
weddings.faq3Answer: A complete package includes church decoration (candles, crowns, altar, entrance), the bridal bouquet, reception venue decoration (centerpieces, wish table), and delivery with setup. Prices are tailored to your specific needs.

baptisms.title: Baptism Decorations
baptisms.heroDescription: We create joyful and elegant baptism decorations that make this special day even more magical. Every arrangement is crafted with care and love.
baptisms.content1: A baptism is one of the most important moments in a family's life, and at Kaloudis we ensure that the decoration is perfect in every detail. We handle complete baptism decoration — church floral arrangements, baptismal font decoration, candle decoration, and stunning compositions for the church entrance.
baptisms.content2: Baptism reception decoration includes table centerpieces, sweet table and candy buffet decoration, as well as special constructions with balloons and flowers. We serve baptisms at churches and reception venues throughout Attica.
baptisms.content3: We customize every decoration to match your chosen baptism theme — prince, princess, animals, flowers, nautical, or whatever you dream of. Our team combines fresh flowers with decorative elements for a harmonious and unique result.
baptisms.content4: We offer free consultations at our shop, where you can view photos of previous work, choose colors and themes, and receive a detailed quote. Every baptism is unique and treated with the same dedication.
baptisms.feature1Desc: Baptismal font decoration, church entrance and interior arrangements with fresh flowers and accents
baptisms.feature2Desc: Stunning baptism candle decoration with flowers, ribbons, and themed elements
baptisms.feature3Desc: Table arrangements, candy buffet, sweet table, and special constructions
baptisms.feature4Desc: Full customization to match your baptism theme with flowers and decorative elements combined
baptisms.faq1Question: Can you create a baptism decoration with a specific theme?
baptisms.faq1Answer: Yes, we customize every decoration to match your chosen theme. Whether it's animals, flowers, nautical, or something completely original, we create arrangements that perfectly match your aesthetic vision.
baptisms.faq2Question: How much does a baptism decoration cost?
baptisms.faq2Answer: The cost depends on the type of decoration, the flowers you choose, and the venue. We offer free cost estimates after a consultation at our shop, where we discuss your needs in detail.
baptisms.faq3Question: Do you handle delivery and setup?
baptisms.faq3Answer: Of course! Our team handles complete delivery, setup, and takedown of the decoration. We serve churches and reception venues throughout Attica.

churchIcons.title: Church & Icon Decorations
churchIcons.heroDescription: We create stunning floral decorations for religious icons, churches and sacred spaces. From patron saint celebrations to seasonal religious holidays.
churchIcons.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we undertake floral decoration of icons, churches and sacred temples throughout Attica. We decorate saint icons, iconostases, solea areas, church entrances and exterior spaces with fresh flowers and original compositions.
churchIcons.content2: We serve patron saint celebrations, feast days, religious ceremonies and seasonal holidays (Easter, Christmas, Dormition of the Virgin). Every composition is designed with respect for the sacred space and religious tradition.
churchIcons.content3: We collaborate with parishes throughout Attica. We handle delivery, setup and takedown of all decorations.
churchIcons.content4: We use high-quality seasonal flowers — roses, lilies, baby's breath, orchids — and create compositions that highlight the splendor of each celebration. Visit our shop to plan the decoration together.
churchIcons.feature1Desc: Floral decoration of saint icons with wreaths, garlands and original flower compositions
churchIcons.feature2Desc: Complete church decoration — iconostasis, solea, entrance, columns and exterior space
churchIcons.feature3Desc: Specialized decoration for patron saint celebrations, feast days and religious ceremonies
churchIcons.feature4Desc: Church decoration for Easter, Christmas, Dormition and major religious holidays
churchIcons.faq1Question: Do you decorate icons at any church?
churchIcons.faq1Answer: Yes, we serve churches throughout Attica. Our team handles delivery, setup and takedown. We coordinate with the priest or parish for all details.
churchIcons.faq2Question: How early should I book for a feast day?
churchIcons.faq2Answer: We recommend contacting us at least 2 weeks in advance, especially during peak periods (Easter, Dormition). For large celebrations, one month ahead is ideal.
churchIcons.faq3Question: What types of flowers do you use?
churchIcons.faq3Answer: We use high-quality fresh seasonal flowers — roses, lilies, baby's breath, orchids, chrysanthemums. Selection depends on the season, celebration and your preferences.

receptions.title: Reception & Event Decorations
receptions.heroDescription: We transform any reception or event space with unique floral arrangements. Parties, birthdays, engagements, name days and social events.
receptions.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we undertake floral decoration for every type of reception and event throughout Attica. From engagements and birthdays to graduations, name days and corporate parties — we create the right atmosphere with flowers.
receptions.content2: We design centerpieces, entrance installations, candy bars, photo corners and all types of floral installations. Every event is unique and treated with distinctive creativity.
receptions.content3: We collaborate with reception halls, estates, restaurants and private venues throughout Attica.
receptions.content4: We offer free consultations at our shop to discuss your ideas, review venue photos and provide a detailed quote. Every composition is made with fresh flowers on the day of the event.
receptions.feature1Desc: Central flower arrangements, small compositions and runners for every table type
receptions.feature2Desc: Impressive arches, entrance constructions and welcome displays with flowers
receptions.feature3Desc: Floral decoration for candy bars, dessert tables and photo corners
receptions.feature4Desc: Full customization to match your event's theme and color palette
receptions.faq1Question: What types of events do you cover?
receptions.faq1Answer: We cover every type of event — engagements, birthdays, name days, graduations, baby showers, corporate events, parties and social gatherings.
receptions.faq2Answer: Of course! We handle both indoor and outdoor spaces — estates, gardens, rooftops, terraces. Our team takes care of delivery and setup.
receptions.faq3Answer: For large events we recommend at least 2-3 weeks in advance. For smaller celebrations we can accommodate shorter timelines, depending on availability.

commercialSpaces.title: Commercial Space Decorations
commercialSpaces.heroDescription: We elevate your business image with fresh flower arrangements. Offices, hotels, shops, restaurants and reception areas.
commercialSpaces.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we offer floral decoration services for commercial spaces throughout Attica. We create weekly or monthly flower arrangements for offices, reception areas, hotels, restaurants, shops and showrooms.
commercialSpaces.content2: Flowers in commercial spaces enhance aesthetics, create positive impressions on clients and improve the work environment. We customize every arrangement to match your business identity and aesthetic.
commercialSpaces.content3: We serve commercial spaces throughout Attica. Delivery is made on a regular schedule to your premises.
commercialSpaces.content4: We offer flexible subscription packages — weekly flower arrangement changes, bi-weekly refreshes or monthly decoration. We also handle decoration for corporate events, grand openings and special occasions.
commercialSpaces.feature1Desc: Regular renewal of flower arrangements at your premises with fresh seasonal flowers
commercialSpaces.feature2Desc: Elegant compositions for reception areas, meeting rooms and offices
commercialSpaces.feature3Desc: Daily or weekly decoration for lobbies, dining areas and common spaces
commercialSpaces.feature4Desc: Decoration for grand openings, corporate events, presentations and conferences
commercialSpaces.faq1Question: How much does a weekly office arrangement cost?
commercialSpaces.faq1Answer: The cost depends on the number of arrangements and the flowers you prefer. We offer special packages for long-term partnerships. Contact us for a free estimate.
commercialSpaces.faq2Question: Can you match the flowers to our brand colors?
commercialSpaces.faq2Answer: Absolutely! We customize every arrangement to match your brand colors, aesthetic and identity. From minimal white compositions to bold color combinations.
commercialSpaces.faq3Question: Do you deliver to our premises?
commercialSpaces.faq3Answer: Yes, our service includes delivery, setup and removal of previous arrangements. We serve locations throughout Attica on a regular schedule.

gardenDesign.title: Garden Study & Design
gardenDesign.heroDescription: We design the garden of your dreams with professional study and complete construction. From concept to completion.
gardenDesign.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we offer comprehensive garden study and design services for residential and commercial properties. The process begins with an on-site inspection, assessment of your needs, and analysis of soil and climate conditions. We serve clients throughout Attica.
gardenDesign.content2: Our garden study includes an architectural planting plan, selection of suitable plants for your space's climate and orientation, pathway design, relaxation areas, and lighting layout.
gardenDesign.content3: We also handle complete garden construction — excavation, soil preparation, planting, automatic irrigation installation, lawn laying, and rock garden design and construction with hardy Mediterranean plants. Our experience guarantees results you'll enjoy for years to come.
gardenDesign.content4: Every garden we design considers sustainability, water conservation, and low maintenance. We select plants adapted to the Mediterranean climate and design efficient irrigation systems. Visit our shop to discuss the garden you've been dreaming of.
gardenDesign.feature1Desc: Complete garden plan with space mapping, plant selection, and landscape design
gardenDesign.feature2Desc: Design and construction of rock gardens with hardy, low-maintenance Mediterranean plants
gardenDesign.feature3Desc: Full implementation — planting, lawn, pathways, lighting, and irrigation
gardenDesign.feature4Desc: Mediterranean plant selection, water conservation, and low-maintenance design approach
gardenDesign.faq1Question: What does a garden study include?
gardenDesign.faq1Answer: The study includes an on-site inspection, architectural planting plan, plant selection, pathway and lighting design, and a detailed budget. We deliver a complete file with all plans and specifications.
gardenDesign.faq2Question: How much does garden design cost?
gardenDesign.faq2Answer: The cost depends on the size of the space and your requirements. The initial inspection and consultation are free. After that, we provide a detailed quote for both the study and construction phases.
gardenDesign.faq3Question: Do you offer maintenance after construction?
gardenDesign.faq3Answer: Yes! We offer comprehensive garden maintenance services after construction — regular pruning, fertilizing, irrigation checks, and plant protection. This keeps your garden in perfect condition year-round.

maintenance.title: Garden Maintenance
maintenance.heroDescription: Flexible and customized garden maintenance services. We keep your garden in perfect condition year-round with regular, tailored care.
maintenance.content1: The Kaloudis team handles regular garden maintenance for gardens, balconies, and outdoor spaces throughout Attica. We offer flexible and customized care programs covering lawn mowing, plant pruning, fertilizing, plant protection spraying, and irrigation system checks.
maintenance.content2: Every maintenance program is flexibly designed around your garden's specific needs — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly care — customized to your budget. Every visit includes a plant health check and seasonal tasks to keep everything thriving.
maintenance.feature1Desc: Weekly or monthly maintenance including lawn mowing, pruning, and cleanup
maintenance.feature2Desc: Seasonal fertilizing and spraying for healthy and vibrant plants
maintenance.feature3Desc: Regular inspection and adjustment of automatic irrigation systems
maintenance.faq1Question: How often does my garden need maintenance?
maintenance.faq1Answer: It depends on the type of garden and the season. Generally, we recommend at least two visits per month during summer and one during winter to keep everything in top shape.
maintenance.faq2Question: Do you maintain apartment building gardens?
maintenance.faq2Answer: Yes, we serve both private gardens and shared apartment building spaces throughout Attica. We offer special rates for long-term maintenance contracts.

irrigation.title: Automatic Irrigation Systems
irrigation.heroDescription: We design and install modern automatic irrigation systems that save water and time while keeping your garden perfectly watered.
irrigation.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we design and install automatic irrigation systems for gardens, balcony planters, lawns, and indoor plants. We serve residential and commercial properties throughout Attica.
irrigation.content2: We use quality materials from leading brands (Hunter, Rain Bird) and next-generation controllers with smartphone control capabilities. Every system is designed for maximum water savings and uniform distribution across your garden.
irrigation.feature1Desc: Design and installation of automatic irrigation with drip lines, sprinklers, or spray nozzles
irrigation.feature2Desc: Regular maintenance, winterization, and prompt repair of any issues
irrigation.feature3Desc: Installation of smart controllers with mobile app control for convenient management
irrigation.faq1Question: How much does automatic irrigation installation cost?
irrigation.faq1Answer: The cost depends on the size of the area, the number of irrigation zones, and the type of system. We offer free on-site inspections and detailed quotes tailored to your needs.
irrigation.faq2Question: Can it be installed in an existing garden?
irrigation.faq2Answer: Absolutely! We install irrigation systems in both new and existing gardens with minimal disruption to current plantings. Our team ensures a clean installation every time.

pruning.title: Pruning Services
pruning.heroDescription: Professional tree and shrub pruning for health, safety, and aesthetics in your garden throughout Attica.
pruning.content1: The Kaloudis team handles professional pruning of trees, shrubs, and plants throughout Attica. Proper pruning is essential for plant health, creating the right canopy shape, and improving flowering and fruit production.
pruning.content2: We perform shaping, thinning, rejuvenation, and sanitary pruning. Every job is carried out by experienced staff with professional tools, following the correct pruning guidelines for each plant species.
pruning.feature1Desc: Shaping, canopy thinning, and removal of dead or hazardous branches
pruning.feature2Desc: Shaping of shrubs and hedges for a neat and tidy appearance
pruning.feature3Desc: Correct pruning timing for each plant species to achieve optimal results
pruning.faq1Question: When is the best time for pruning?
pruning.faq1Answer: It depends on the plant species. Most deciduous trees are pruned in winter, while evergreen shrubs can be pruned at various times. Our team will guide you on the best timing for each plant.
pruning.faq2Answer: Yes, our service includes complete cleanup and removal of all branches after pruning. We leave your property clean and tidy every time.

tallTrees.title: Tall Tree Cutting
tallTrees.heroDescription: Safe cutting and removal of tall or hazardous trees with specialized equipment and experienced crew throughout Attica.
tallTrees.content1: Tall tree cutting requires specialized equipment, experience, and proper planning. At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we have the right equipment and trained personnel for tall tree cutting throughout Attica.
tallTrees.content2: We handle tree cutting in difficult locations — near buildings, electrical cables, or tight spaces — using controlled felling techniques. Safety is always our top priority on every job.
tallTrees.feature1Desc: Controlled cutting of tall trees with specialized equipment and safety techniques
tallTrees.feature2Desc: Full removal of trunks, branches, and foliage from your property
tallTrees.feature3Desc: Specialization in cutting near buildings, cables, and confined spaces
tallTrees.faq1Question: Do I need a permit to cut a tree?
tallTrees.faq1Answer: In some cases, yes. Depending on the municipality and the type of tree, a cutting permit may be required. We inform you about the process and help with the necessary documentation.
tallTrees.faq2Question: How much does it cost to cut a tall tree?
tallTrees.faq2Answer: The price depends on the tree's height, access difficulty, and the equipment required. We offer free on-site inspections and detailed quotes for every job.

rockGardens.title: Rock Gardens
rockGardens.heroDescription: We design and build stunning rock gardens that add character and natural beauty to your outdoor space.
rockGardens.content1: A rock garden is an excellent solution for sloped areas, poor soil, or for those who want a low-maintenance garden with Mediterranean character. At Kaloudis, we design and build rock gardens throughout Attica.
rockGardens.content2: We use natural rocks, gravel, and drought-resistant plants — lavender, thyme, rosemary, sedum, agave, and many more. Each rock garden is unique, designed to blend harmoniously with your landscape.
rockGardens.feature1Desc: Complete study with rock selection, plant choices, and terrain shaping
rockGardens.feature2Desc: Rock placement, terrain shaping, planting, and irrigation system installation
rockGardens.feature3Desc: Hardy Mediterranean plants that require minimal watering and care
rockGardens.faq1Question: Does a rock garden need watering?
rockGardens.faq1Answer: Very little! The plants we use are drought-resistant. We typically install a simple drip irrigation system for the first few months, after which the plants become self-sufficient.
rockGardens.faq2Question: What spaces are suitable for a rock garden?
rockGardens.faq2Answer: Rock gardens work in courtyards, gardens, rooftops, and balconies. They're ideal for sloped areas or poor soil quality, as well as modern architectural settings.

landClearing.title: Land Clearing
landClearing.heroDescription: We handle complete clearing and preparation of vacant lots, undeveloped land, and abandoned gardens throughout Attica.
landClearing.content1: Land clearing is essential for both fire protection and aesthetics. At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we handle land clearing for vacant lots and undeveloped spaces throughout Attica. The work includes vegetation removal, grass cutting, and removal of debris and branches.
landClearing.content2: We also offer post-clearing preparation services — ground leveling, planting, and irrigation installation. We transform abandoned plots into clean, safe, and green spaces ready for use.
landClearing.feature1Desc: Grass cutting, weed removal, and cleanup of debris and rubble from your property
landClearing.feature2Desc: Land clearing in compliance with fire protection regulations and deadlines
landClearing.feature3Desc: Ground leveling, planting, and transformation of vacant lots into functional gardens
landClearing.faq1Answer: Yes, according to current Greek legislation, property owners are required to clear their lots by the end of May each year for fire protection purposes. Failure to comply can result in fines.
landClearing.faq2Answer: Yes, we handle plots of all sizes. We have the right equipment for small urban lots as well as larger properties across Attica.

pestControl.title: Pest Control & Spraying
pestControl.heroDescription: We protect your plants from diseases and pests with professional spraying services in collaboration with a specialized agronomist.
pestControl.content1: At Kaloudis, we provide plant protection services — spraying, treatments, and pest control — in collaboration with a specialized agronomist. We treat fungal diseases, aphids, scale insects, mites, psyllids, and all types of pests. We serve gardens, courtyards, and parks throughout Attica.
pestControl.content2: We use approved plant protection products that are safe for humans, pets, and the environment. Our agronomist evaluates the problem and applies targeted treatment for maximum effectiveness and minimal environmental impact. At our shop you'll also find pest control products for insects, cockroaches, ants, and mice.
pestControl.feature1Desc: Assessment by a specialized agronomist and identification of the problem
pestControl.feature2Desc: Targeted spraying with approved products for effective pest control
pestControl.feature3Desc: Seasonal preventive spraying to avoid diseases and pest infestations
pestControl.faq1Question: Are the products you use safe?
pestControl.faq1Answer: Yes, we exclusively use approved plant protection products that are safe for humans, pets, and beneficial insects. Our agronomist always selects the least toxic solution available.
pestControl.faq2Answer: The frequency depends on the problem. Preventive spraying is done seasonally (2-3 times per year), while therapeutic treatment may require repeated applications over several weeks.

ProductPages.ctaSubtitle: Visit our shop or contact us for more information
ProductPages.contentCTA: Beyond our products, we also offer <services>complete landscaping services</services> including maintenance, irrigation and <weddings>wedding and baptism decoration</weddings> throughout Attica.
ProductPages.subtitle: Wide variety of flowers, plants and garden supplies for every need
ProductPages.catalogSubtitle: Products available for delivery throughout Attica

flowers.title: Flowers & Plants
flowers.heroDescription: Fresh flowers, indoor and outdoor plants, rare species and carnivorous plants. Discover our unique collection.
flowers.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we offer one of the richest collections of flowers and plants in Attica. Our range includes fresh cut flowers — roses, gardenias, orchids, tulips, sunflowers, lilies, and seasonal blooms — perfect for bouquets, gifts, and space decoration. We serve customers throughout Attica.
flowers.content2: Our indoor plants include monstera, ficus, sansevieria, ferns, pothos, and many more, in all sizes — from small office desk plants to large decorative living room specimens. For your garden or balcony, we carry outdoor plants, trees, shrubs, climbers, aromatic herbs, and perennial flowers.
flowers.content3: For rare plant enthusiasts, our collection includes carnivorous plants (Dionaea, Drosera, Nepenthes), rare succulent varieties, cacti, tillandsias (air plants), and exotic tropical species. Our team guides you on caring for each plant to ensure healthy, vibrant growth.
flowers.content4: We create bouquets and arrangements for every occasion — birthdays, name days, anniversaries, memorials, and corporate gifts. Each arrangement is handcrafted with fresh materials and delivered same-day throughout Attica.
flowers.feature1Desc: Roses, orchids, lilies, tulips, and seasonal blooms — perfect for bouquets and gifts
flowers.feature2Desc: Monstera, ficus, sansevieria, ferns, and more in every size for your home or office
flowers.feature3Desc: Trees, shrubs, climbers, aromatic herbs, and perennials for garden and balcony
flowers.feature4Desc: Carnivorous plants, succulents, cacti, air plants, and tropical species for collectors
flowers.faq1Answer: Yes, we deliver bouquets and arrangements same-day throughout Attica. You can order by phone or visit our shop to choose in person.
flowers.faq2Question: Do you have carnivorous plants available?
flowers.faq2Answer: Yes! We carry carnivorous plants like Dionaea (Venus flytrap), Drosera (sundew), and Nepenthes (pitcher plant). Availability varies, so contact us or visit the shop to check.
flowers.faq3Question: Can you advise me on plant care?
flowers.faq3Answer: Of course! Our team provides detailed care instructions for every plant — watering, lighting, fertilizing, and repotting. We're always available for questions.

soil.title: Soil & Substrates
soil.heroDescription: Specialized soils and substrates for every type of plant. Find the right growing medium at our shop.
soil.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we carry quality soils and substrates for every planting need. Choosing the right soil is critical for healthy plant growth — that's why we offer specialized mixes for pots, gardens, lawns, vegetables, and cacti.
soil.content2: Our range includes general-purpose potting mix, container soil, peat, perlite, vermiculite, compost, herb mix, orchid bark, cactus mix, and specialized substrates tailored to each plant's pH and drainage requirements.
soil.feature1Desc: Light, airy substrate ideal for indoor plants and balcony containers
soil.feature2Desc: Nutrient-rich soil for garden planting and flower beds
soil.feature3Desc: Orchid bark, cactus mix, herb soil, and vegetable substrates with specialized formulations
soil.faq1Question: What soil does my pot plant need?
soil.faq1Answer: It depends on the plant. Most indoor plants thrive in light potting mix with good drainage. Visit our shop and we'll help you choose the right one for your specific plant.
soil.faq2Question: Do you sell soil in bulk?
soil.faq2Answer: Yes, we carry soil in both small bags for pots and large quantities (bags or bulk) for gardens and landscaping projects.

fertilizers.title: Fertilizers
fertilizers.heroDescription: Quality fertilizers for healthy growth and rich blooming. Organic and chemical fertilizers at our shop.
fertilizers.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, you'll find quality fertilizers for every plant type and need. From organic fertilizers (compost, guano, bone meal) to slow-release chemical fertilizers, water-soluble fertilizers, and specialized formulas for flowering, fruiting, or foliage growth.
fertilizers.content2: Our team guides you in choosing the right fertilizer, dosage, and application timing. We carry fertilizers from leading brands in every package size to suit your needs.
fertilizers.feature1Desc: Compost, guano, and biological products for natural plant nutrition
fertilizers.feature2Desc: Slow-release, water-soluble, and granular fertilizers for fast results
fertilizers.feature3Desc: Fertilizers for flowering, lawns, cacti, orchids, and citrus trees
fertilizers.faq1Question: What fertilizer does my garden need?
fertilizers.faq1Answer: It depends on the plants and the season. Generally, we recommend a balanced fertilizer (e.g., 20-20-20) for general nutrition, and specialized formulas for flowering or fruiting plants. Visit us for personalized advice.
fertilizers.faq2Question: When should I fertilize my plants?
fertilizers.faq2Answer: The main fertilizing season is spring and summer, when plants are actively growing. In winter, we reduce fertilizing. Our team can provide a detailed schedule for your specific plants.

pots.title: Pots & Planters
pots.heroDescription: Pots in every size and style, from classic ceramic to modern decorative planters. Find the perfect pot at our shop.
pots.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we carry a wide variety of pots for every need and aesthetic. Our collection includes ceramic pots, lightweight plastic planters, terracotta cachepots, metal planters, wooden containers, and decorative cachepots.
pots.content2: From small window and desk pots to large floor planters for indoor and outdoor spaces. In colors, shapes, and sizes for every taste — classic, modern, rustic, or minimalist.
pots.feature1Desc: Handcrafted and industrial ceramic pots in classic and contemporary designs
pots.feature2Desc: Lightweight, durable planters in every size, ideal for balconies and rooftops
pots.feature3Desc: Elegant cachepots, planters, and metallic containers in modern and classic styles
pots.faq1Question: What pot does my plant need?
pots.faq1Answer: The right pot depends on the plant's size, drainage needs, and placement location. At our shop, we help you choose the ideal size and material for healthy growth.
pots.faq2Answer: Yes, we handle delivery of large pots to your location throughout Attica. Contact us for more details and delivery options.

pestProducts.title: Pest Control Products
pestProducts.heroDescription: Solutions for mice, cockroaches, ants, snakes and all types of insects. Find the right product at our shop.
pestProducts.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, you'll find a complete range of pest control and rodent elimination products. We carry mouse poison, mouse traps, products for cockroaches, ants, wasps, fleas and all types of insects.
pestProducts.content2: You'll also find snake and centipede repellent solutions, as well as protective products for gardens and outdoor spaces. Our team advises you on the correct use and application of each product.
pestProducts.feature1Desc: Baits, traps and products for complete elimination of mice and rodents
pestProducts.feature2Desc: Products for cockroaches, ants, wasps, fleas and all types of insects
pestProducts.feature3Desc: Specialized repellent products for snakes, centipedes and reptiles
pestProducts.faq1Question: Are the products safe for pets?
pestProducts.faq1Answer: We carry both standard products and pet-safe options for homes with pets and children. Our team guides you in choosing the right product.
pestProducts.faq2Question: Can you recommend a solution for my problem?
pestProducts.faq2Answer: Of course! Visit our shop and describe your problem. We'll recommend the right products and proper application method.
